title: Starter mission brief
mission_summary: Use this artifact to capture the few high-signal PM questions that should drive the first bounded ProductOS execution loop.
customer_problem: Describe the user problem ProductOS should help solve first.
business_goal: Describe the business outcome or strategic goal this loop should support.
constraints: Keep PM approval explicit for decision-driving scope.
Mark inferred claims explicitly when evidence is incomplete.
next_action: Replace this starter mission with your product-specific mission before running the first discover loop.
